_source: CPIC Guideline for Thiopurines and TPMT (2018 update)

azathioprine.Normal Metabolizer: Standard starting dose. Monitor for myelosuppression.
azathioprine.Intermediate Metabolizer: Reduce dose by 30-70%. Start at 30-70% of target dose. Monitor closely for myelosuppression.
azathioprine.Poor Metabolizer: Consider alternative agent or drastically reduce dose (10% of standard). If thiopurine is used, start at drastically reduced dose (10 mg/m2/day) and monitor weekly.

mercaptopurine.Normal Metabolizer: Standard starting dose. Monitor for myelosuppression.
mercaptopurine.Intermediate Metabolizer: Reduce dose by 30-70%. Start at 30-70% of target dose. Monitor closely for myelosuppression.
mercaptopurine.Poor Metabolizer: Consider alternative agent or drastically reduce dose (10% of standard). If thiopurine is used, start at drastically reduced dose and monitor weekly.

thioguanine.Normal Metabolizer: Standard starting dose. Monitor for myelosuppression.
thioguanine.Intermediate Metabolizer: Reduce dose by 30-70%. Monitor closely for myelosuppression.
thioguanine.Poor Metabolizer: Consider alternative agent or drastically reduce dose. Monitor weekly for myelosuppression.
